## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Imubit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and future initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [20% increase in impressions, clicks, and sessions; AI mentions up from 30% to 35% presence](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [Glossary pages proposed as future SEO strategy, pending CMS decision and implementation](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Content opportunities identified around integrating feedstock/utility prices with AI optimization](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Imubit working on messaging alignment and new survey data for potential content creation](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [20% increase in impressions, clicks, engaged sessions, and overall sessions](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [AI mentions increased from 30% to 35% presence in monitored prompts](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [SEMrush data shows good movement in top 3 to first page rankings (up to position 10)](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [Current focus on step-by-step guides to self-optimizing plants, incorporating advisory mode](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

### Glossary Pages Strategy

  - [Proposed as an SEO play to leverage high-volume keywords not warranting full articles](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Each term would have its own page, focusing on frequently used industry terms](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Benefits: internal linking opportunities, contextual relevance for industrial AI](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Concerns raised about potential volume (hundreds of terms) and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [Implementation to be considered after CMS decision to avoid migration issues](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)

### Content Opportunities with Feedstock/Utility Prices

  - [Potential for articles on benefits of connecting AI optimization with feedstock/utility price data](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Example: "If propylene prices spike, the optimizer may shift cut points to make more propylene"](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
  - [Aligns with Imubit's direction towards coordinated operating strategies](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [Opportunity to differentiate content by focusing on business optimization, not just process optimization](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### Future Content Directions

  - [Exploring scenarios that could be simulated with Imubit for middle-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Waiting for new messaging alignment before proceeding with certain topics](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [Potential to integrate stakeholder-specific KPIs (e.g., CFO vs. process engineer) in future content](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Await CMS decision before implementing glossary pages strategy](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Imubit to provide updated messaging and survey data on workforce research](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [GrowthX to review existing workforce research content for potential updates](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [Explore content opportunities around coordinated operating strategies and stakeholder integration](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [Consider adding stakeholder integration to predictions content](https://fathom.video/share/FKAMBatvu3x5yQaNJ7PD5MjX9iwyZsZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
